violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Employee(s) must register in, and successfully complete, an approved course in food safety management. One employee must then register with RIDOH Center for Food Protection as the Certified Food Safety Manager. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

A container and container lids observed in the hand-washing sinks in the kitchen and warewashing areas. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

Knives observed stored between the knife rack and the wall. Utensils must be stored in a clean, dry location. Utensils observed to be displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025
Refrigerator door gasket of the 1-door reach-in observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Gasket must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher at the bar. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2025
There is leaking at the faucet of the 3-bay sink. Plumbing must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/27/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the facility. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2025
Refrigerator door gasket of the 1-door reach-in observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2024
